meaning: v.狼吞虎咽,贪婪地吃  飞碟游戏(比赛双方每组5人,相距15码,互相掷接飞碟)
examples: You have to give her top marks for moral guts.
He doesn't have the guts to walk away from a well-paid job.
By the time they finish, the crewmen are standing ankle-deep in fish guts.
It takes guts, it takes grit, it takes a do WHATEVER it takes mentality.
It takes guts and gumption to put aside partisanship in favor of good governance.
